summary: Allows targeting individual creatures within Swarms.
description: Allows the targeting of individual creatures within Swarms, enabling attacks to disrupt the Swarm by destroying or pushing a single member away from the host. See page 99.

summary: Move target toward source until stacks depleted or collision.
description: Move the target toward the source of Pull until stacks are depleted or until the target collides with the source of the Pull. Unlike Push, Pulls cannot cause collision damage.

summary: Move target away from attack origin by X spaces; collision damage for blocked spaces.
description: Move the target away from the attack's origin by X spaces. Push:3 from an attacker to the east moves the target 3 spaces to the west. When a pushed target is unable to move some (or all) of the distance due to an obstructing unit, wall, or other impassable feature, the target takes 1 damage for each space they are unable to move. The obstruction is pushed 1 square if it is something able to be pushed. Map edges stop movement unless it is more interesting or narratively appropriate not to.

summary: Ignores cover; shoots through walls up to stack value.
description: This unit or attack ignores cover and may shoot through objects or walls blocking Line of Sight up to the value of Piercing (Piercing:2 allows an attack to penetrate through 2 squares of wall).
This unit or attack ignores negative elevation penalties.
